name: Accelerated Peak Oil Demand
description: Electric vehicles, heat pumps, and efficiency gains push global oil demand past a structural peak. Prices for oil and related sovereigns fall sharply while renewables manufacturing and installation scale—creating localized booms and measurable personal upside for workers who transition.
trigger_event: IEA and major agencies confirm oil demand has peaked as EV share and alternatives accelerate

global_oil_demand_peak.event: World oil demand stops growing and enters gentle decline
global_oil_demand_peak.detail: IEA Oil Market Report and World Energy Outlook scenarios show demand plateauing then falling under stated policies; peak timing debated but directionally supported by EV sales curves.
global_oil_demand_peak.unit: % YoY demand decline once past peak
global_oil_demand_peak.source: IEA World Energy Outlook 2024; BP Energy Outlook demand scenarios

capex_shift_to_electrons.event: Upstream oil investment is diverted to grids, batteries, and renewables
capex_shift_to_electrons.detail: IEA tracks clean energy investment exceeding fossil fuel investment; 2023 clean energy investment reached roughly $1.8 trillion per IEA.
capex_shift_to_electrons.unit: billion USD annual clean investment (2023 level, growing)

brent_price_structural_slump.event: Spot oil prices trend lower as spare capacity meets flat demand
brent_price_structural_slump.detail: 2014–2016 and 2020 episodes showed rapid oil price crashes when demand softens; long-run price needed to balance some petrostates has been estimated well above marginal cost for swing producers.
brent_price_structural_slump.unit: % price decline vs prior decade average (scenario)
brent_price_structural_slump.source: World Bank commodity markets outlook; OPEC Monthly Oil Market Report historical prices

petrostate_fiscal_stress.event: Oil exporters cut budgets and subsidies as fiscal breakevens bite
petrostate_fiscal_stress.detail: IMF estimates fiscal breakeven oil prices often $60–$90+ for Gulf states; sustained lower prices force deficit spending or austerity.
petrostate_fiscal_stress.source: IMF Regional Economic Outlook: Middle East and Central Asia

fx_and_debt_pressure.event: Emerging oil currencies weaken and sovereign spreads widen
fx_and_debt_pressure.detail: During 2014–2016 oil slump, RUB, NOK, CAD, and MXN moved sharply with crude; EM energy exporters saw CDS spreads rise.
fx_and_debt_pressure.source: BIS effective exchange rate data; IMF external sector reports

imported_renewables_cost_advantage.event: Cheaper imported solar/wind gear improves project IRR for developing grids
imported_renewables_cost_advantage.detail: Lazard LCOE analyses show utility solar and wind at or below marginal fossil costs in many markets; currency moves can offset but equipment learning curves dominate.
imported_renewables_cost_advantage.source: Lazard Levelized Cost of Energy Analysis; IRENA renewable cost database

renewables_manufacturing_boom.event: Battery, inverter, and turbine factories run at high utilization
renewables_manufacturing_boom.detail: U.S. IRA and EU Net-Zero Industry Act incentivize factory builds; IEA tracks strong jobs growth in clean energy employment—clean energy jobs reached roughly 30 million globally in IEA 2024 employment estimate.
renewables_manufacturing_boom.unit: million clean energy jobs (IEA order of magnitude)

local_installer_and_grid_jobs.event: Electrician, technician, and grid interconnection backlogs lift wages
local_installer_and_grid_jobs.detail: U.S. BLS projects strong growth for solar installers; union and non-union training programs expanded under federal infrastructure laws.
local_installer_and_grid_jobs.source: U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics Occupational Outlook (solar photovoltaic installers)

personal_energy_bill_relief.event: Your gasoline and heating oil spending falls with weaker crude
personal_energy_bill_relief.detail: Retail gasoline correlates with Brent; households in car-dependent suburbs gain disposable income when oil prices structurally decline.

personal_green_career_uplift.event: Your wages and hours rise in installation, maintenance, or factory roles
personal_green_career_uplift.detail: Entry-level solar installer and battery technician roles offer above-minimum compensation in many U.S. metros with overtime during buildouts.
personal_green_career_uplift.source: calculated; BLS wage quartiles for installers
